message:
fix(runtime,transport): audit fixes for spawn_blocking repoll and aggregator quality_score

- spawn_blocking: add `completed` flag to BlockingOneshotReceiver to fail-closed
  on repoll after completion (clippy manual_assert + repoll guard)
- aggregator: guard quality_score against log10(0)=-inf with .max(1) on zero bandwidth
- aggregator: use saturating_sub for sequence gap calculation
- Add 3 regression tests (2 repoll, 1 quality_score)
- Remove 3 orphaned wrapping-distance tests referencing deleted function

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
